{{Infobox concept
| name = World Spirits
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Shadow Ark]] can surpass [[The Last Horizon]] if enough [[World Spirits]] cooperate in a cohesive system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[World Spirits]] have been buried by [[Hallow Divide]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] is composed of [[World Spirits]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
